text: I had like a keenwa salad for lunch with some feta cheese and cucumber
_comment: PHONETIC TRANSCRIPTION: 'quinoa' spoken and transcribed as 'keenwa' — how many English speakers actually pronounce it, rendered phonetically by voice-to-text. Step 1 LLM must recognise 'keenwa' as 'quinoa' per its correction rule. Also tests 3-item extraction: quinoa salad + feta cheese + cucumber. Step 3 must then route 'quinoa (salad)' toward grains, 'feta' toward dairy, 'cucumber' toward vegetables.
